sections.paragraph:
Original: תּפתּה

Transliteration: tophteh

Phonetic: tof-teh'

BDB Definition:

Tophet = "place of fire"
  1. a place in the southeast end of the valley of the son of Hinnom south of Jerusalem
    1. same as H8612

Origin: probably a form of H8612

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
